notes: Mechanics: homophone (5) + initials (5). Homophone last used 2026-06-28; initials last used 2026-06-29 — both most overdue.
Homophone pairs: leek/leak, mane/main, vane/vain, isle/aisle, rite/right.
Initials answers: Stanley Cup (S.C. $200), Trojan Horse (T.H. $400), Mardi Gras (M.G. $400), Magna Carta (M.C. $600), Fibonacci Sequence (F.S. $800).
